_notes.vercel: Vercel deployments sleep after inactivity on free tier. First ping may be slow (cold start). Use the /api/health route if available, otherwise root URL.
_notes.railway: Railway services on free tier may be suspended after 500 hrs/month. Prefer a /health endpoint over root. If it returns 502, the service is sleeping — not necessarily gone.
_notes.cloudflare_pages: Always-on, no cold starts. HEAD requests work fine.
